hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】有抱负的预测市场提供商表示，体育博彩应作为金融产品而不是赌博进行监管；【CRYPTO】十一项目报告认为，比特币的量子迁移可能为时已晚；【FINANCE】Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在。

items.title: Sports betting should be regulated as a financial product, not gambling, aspiring prediction market provider says
items.summary: Novig CEO Jacob Fortinsky said his company will transition to a federal Designated Contract Market framework this summer to launch in all 50 states, while 57 Maiden's Adam Mastrelli said he was banned from two major sportsbooks within two months for being “sharp."
items.title_zh: 有抱负的预测市场提供商表示，体育博彩应作为金融产品而不是赌博进行监管
items.summary_zh: Novig 首席执行官 Jacob Fortinsky 表示，他的公司将于今年夏天过渡到联邦指定合同市场框架，并在所有 50 个州推出，而 57 Maiden 的 Adam Mastrelli 表示，他在两个月内因“敏锐”而被两家主要体育博彩公司禁止。

items.title: It might be too late for bitcoin’s quantum migration, Project Eleven report argues
items.summary: Quantum computing does not only pose a risk to up to $3 trillion in digital assets, it also threatens the security of banking systems, military communications, digital identities and more, Project Eleven’s report warns.
items.title_zh: 十一项目报告认为，比特币的量子迁移可能为时已晚
items.summary_zh: Project Eleven 的报告警告称，量子计算不仅对高达 3 万亿美元的数字资产构成风险，还威胁到银行系统、军事通信、数字身份等的安全。

items.title: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.summary: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.summary_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
items.summary: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列空袭造成39人死亡
items.summary_zh: 尽管上个月宣布了停火协议，以色列和真主党仍在继续交火。

items.title: Britain’s Electorate Is ‘Splintering.’ Can Its System Stand the Strain?
items.summary: Insurgent parties like Reform U.K. surged at the polls this week. But the British electoral system wasn’t built for multiparty democracy.
items.title_zh: 英国选民正在“分裂”。其制度能否承受压力？
items.summary_zh: 像英国改革党这样的叛乱政党本周在民意调查中的支持率飙升。但英国的选举制度并不是为多党民主而建立的。

items.title: CME is set to let traders bet on bitcoin volatility, not just price
items.summary: CME Group plans to launch bitcoin volatility futures on June 1 pending regulatory approval bringing a easy way to bet on the degree of price swings.
items.title_zh: 芝商所将让交易者押注比特币波动性，而不仅仅是价格
items.summary_zh: 芝商所计划于 6 月 1 日推出比特币波动率期货，等待监管机构批准，从而为押注价格波动程度提供一种简单的方法。

items.title: Swiss central bank bitcoin reserve push fails over signature shortfall
items.summary: The initiative sought to amend Switzerland's constitution, requiring the Swiss National Bank (SNB) to hold BTC alongside gold and foreign-currency reserves.
items.title_zh: 瑞士央行比特币储备计划因签名短缺而失败
items.summary_zh: 该倡议旨在修改瑞士宪法，要求瑞士国家银行（SNB）除了持有黄金和外汇储备外，还持有比特币。

items.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 使用 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展网络的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 GPT-5.5 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 扩展了网络可信访问，帮助经过验证的防御者加速漏洞研究并保护关键基础设施。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.summary: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title: Kalshi traders see odds rising that a U.S.-Iran nuclear deal will be reached by 2027
items.summary: It comes after Axios reported on Wednesday that the two countries were nearing a one-page memo to end their war.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，美国与伊朗 2027 年达成核协议的可能性上升
items.summary_zh: 此前，Axios 周三报道称，两国即将签署一页备忘录来结束战争。

items.title: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.summary: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.summary_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
items.summary: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.
items.title_zh: 亚洲开发银行斥资 700 亿美元推动能源和数字基础设施建设，使东南亚成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 到 2035 年，东南亚将从亚洲开发银行在亚太地区 700 亿美元的新能源和数字基础设施计划中受益匪浅。

items.title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.summary: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.summary_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
items.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
items.title_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官罗文警告市场调整，抨击竞争对手保险公司的“恶劣”做法
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官马克·罗文（Marc Rowan）警告说，市场面临意外冲击的风险较高，并表示他正在为公司做好防御性调整，以应对预期的调整。

items.title: Iran demands guarantees for World Cup participation
items.summary: The Iranian Football Federation (FFIRI) has presented Fifa with 10 conditions for participation at the World Cup in the US, Mexico and Canada.
items.title_zh: 伊朗要求保证参加世界杯
items.summary_zh: 伊朗足协（FFIRI）向国际足联提出了参加美国、墨西哥和加拿大世界杯的10项条件。

items.title: Mexican parents criticise ending school year a month early for World Cup
items.summary: The federal government faces widespread anger for saying the school year could end on 5 June to accommodate the football tournament.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥家长批评世界杯提前一个月结束学年
items.summary_zh: 联邦政府因称学年可能于 6 月 5 日结束以适应足球锦标赛而面临广泛愤怒。

items.title: Red Card or Black Card? The Conscription Lottery in Thailand.
items.summary: The draft, which is mandatory for men, is a deeply divisive issue in the country. But volunteer enlistments have soared amid a surge in nationalism and a sluggish economy.
items.title_zh: 红卡还是黑卡？泰国的征兵彩票。
items.summary_zh: 该草案对男性具有强制性，在该国是一个存在深刻分歧的问题。但在民族主义高涨和经济低迷的情况下，志愿者入伍人数猛增。

items.title: A Scaled-Back Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability in Ukraine War
items.summary: The event, shrunken because of security fears, adds to a sense that Moscow and other Russian cities can no longer be insulated from the war.
items.title_zh: 缩减规模的胜利日阅兵显示普京在乌克兰战争中日益脆弱
items.summary_zh: 由于安全担忧而缩减的活动增加了一种感觉，即莫斯科和其他俄罗斯城市无法再免受战争的影响。

items.title: Long Overlooked, Caspian Sea Provides Strategic Trade Route for Iran
items.summary: The landlocked body of water has taken on new significance, with Russia shipping military and commercial goods to bolster Tehran’s ability to withstand the U.S. assault.
items.title_zh: 长期被忽视的里海为伊朗提供战略贸易路线
items.summary_zh: 随着俄罗斯运送军事和商业物资以增强德黑兰抵御美国攻击的能力，这片内陆水域已具有新的意义。

items.title: In Hungary, Viktor Orban Loyalists Jump Ship
items.summary: Peter Magyar, the incoming prime minister, has promised to push out “puppets of the old regime.” Many are jumping first.
items.title_zh: 在匈牙利，维克多·欧尔班的效忠者跳船
items.summary_zh: 即将上任的总理彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 承诺将赶走“旧政权的傀儡”。许多人先跳。

items.title: Crypto industry cheers Senate Clarity Act markup date as market structure push resumes
items.summary: The bill's progress follows talks on jurisdiction, consumer/developer protections, and stablecoin rewards, with crypto firms backing a yield compromise.
items.title_zh: 随着市场结构推动的恢复，加密货币行业对参议院《澄清法案》加价日期表示欢迎
items.summary_zh: 该法案的进展是在有关管辖权、消费者/开发商保护和稳定币奖励的谈判之后取得的，加密货币公司支持收益率妥协。

items.title: Emerging-market users are treating crypto exchanges like banking apps, Binance says
items.summary: One point three billion adults lack financial services, 4.7 billion lack credit, and 1.4 billion savers in low-income nations earn no deposit interest, Binance said.
items.title_zh: 币安表示，新兴市场用户正在将加密货币交易所视为银行应用程序
items.summary_zh: 币安表示，1.30 亿成年人缺乏金融服务，47 亿人缺乏信贷，低收入国家 14 亿储户没有存款利息。

items.title: BoE’s Bailey warns of looming ‘wrestle’ with US over stablecoin rules, flags run risk for UK
items.summary: Bailey, who chairs the Financial Stability Board, warned that hard-to-redeem U.S. stablecoins could flood into jurisdictions like the UK during a crisis.
items.title_zh: 英国央行贝利警告称，与美国就稳定币规则展开“角力”迫在眉睫，英国面临风险
items.summary_zh: 金融稳定委员会主席贝利警告说，在危机期间，难以兑换的美国稳定币可能会涌入英国等司法管辖区。

items.title: LayerZero issues public apology for Kelp DAO exploit response, admits fault in single-verifier setup
items.summary: LayerZero also disclosed a previously unreported incident in which a multisig signer used their production hardware wallet to execute a personal trade.
items.title_zh: LayerZero 就 Kelp DAO 漏洞利用响应公开道歉，承认单验证器设置中存在错误
items.summary_zh: LayerZero 还披露了此前未报告的事件，其中多重签名者使用其生产硬件钱包执行个人交易。

items.title: Take two: Senate Banking Committee sets a date to amend and vote on sweeping crypto legislation
items.summary: A much-anticipated hearing to vote on sweeping crypto legislation is happening, marking a second attempt in the Senate Banking Committee.
items.title_zh: 采取二：参议院银行委员会设定了修改和投票全面加密立法的日期
items.summary_zh: 一场备受期待的就全面加密立法进行投票的听证会正在进行，这标志着参议院银行委员会的第二次尝试。

items.title: Kraken parent Payward applies for national OCC trust charter following Ripple, Coinbase
items.summary: The application seeks to establish the Payward National Trust Company, or PNTC.
items.title_zh: 继 Ripple、Coinbase 之后，Kraken 母公司 Payward 申请国家 OCC 信托章程
items.summary_zh: 该申请旨在建立无限循环无限收益国民信托公司（PNTC）。

items.title: SEC weighs new rulemaking for onchain market structures and software applications
items.summary: The SEC needs to clear up how its regulatory framework applies to software applications, said its Chair Paul Atkins on Friday.
items.title_zh: SEC 权衡链上市场结构和软件应用程序的新规则制定
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会主席保罗·阿特金斯周五表示，美国证券交易委员会需要明确其监管框架如何适用于软件应用程序。

items.title: Trending Crypto: LAB (LAB)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #134.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 134 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Solayer (LAYER)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #717.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solayer (LAYER)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#717。

items.title: Trending Crypto: TROLL (TROLL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #326.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：TROLL（TROLL）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#326。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #167.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Billions Network (BILL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 167。

items.title: Trending Crypto: wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #616.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：wojak (WOJAK)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#616。

items.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
items.summary: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption.
items.title_zh: 在 OpenAI 上安全运行 Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何通过沙箱、审批、网络策略和代理本机遥测技术安全地运行 Codex，以支持安全且合规的编码代理采用。

items.title: Simplex rethinks software development with Codex
items.summary: Simplex boosts software development with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex, reducing design, build, and testing time while scaling AI-driven workflows.
items.title_zh: Simplex 使用 Codex 重新思考软件开发
items.summary_zh: Simplex 通过 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 促进软件开发，减少设计、构建和测试时间，同时扩展人工智能驱动的工作流程。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Trump Media’s Q1 loss widens to $406 million on bitcoin, CRO markdowns
items.summary: The loss was primarily driven by $244 million in unrealized losses on cryptocurrency holdings and an additional $108.2 million investment loss.
items.title_zh: Trump Media 第一季度因比特币和 CRO 降价而亏损扩大至 4.06 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该损失主要是由于持有加密货币的 2.44 亿美元未实现损失以及 1.082 亿美元的额外投资损失造成的。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin profit-taking could increase further amid ‘bear market rally’
items.summary: Bitcoin holders are increasingly taking profits after the rally, though a correction may still take time to materialize, CryptoQuant said.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示，在“熊市反弹”期间，比特币获利回吐可能会进一步增加
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，比特币持有者在上涨后越来越多地获利了结，尽管调整可能仍需要时间才能实现。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
items.title_zh: Parloa 建立客户想要交谈的服务代理
items.summary_zh: Parloa 利用 OpenAI 模型为可扩展、语音驱动的 AI 客户服务代理提供支持，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。

items.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
items.summary: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
items.title_zh: 利用 API 中的新模型推进语音智能

items.title: How ChatGPT learns about the world while protecting privacy
items.summary: Learn how ChatGPT safeguards your privacy, reduces personal data in training, and gives you control over whether your conversations improve AI models.

items.summary_zh: 了解 ChatGPT 如何保护您的隐私、减少训练中的个人数据以及让您控制对话是否改进 AI 模型。

items.title: How frontier firms are pulling ahead

items.title: See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: How much further does this Teflon market have to go? Here's what traders say
items.summary: Traders on prediction markets platform Kalshi place a more than 50% chance that the S&P 500 crosses 8,000 in 2026.
items.title_zh: 特氟龙市场还有多远的路要走？这是贸易商的说法
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，标普 500 指数在 2026 年突破 8,000 点的可能性超过 50%。

items.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
items.summary: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，今天的市场感觉就像“1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月”
items.summary_zh: “股市上涨或下跌并不是因为就业或消费者信心，”伯里写道。 “感觉就像 1999-2000 年泡沫的最后几个月。”

items.title: Virus-hit cruise ship arrives in Tenerife as medics await passengers
items.summary: The BBC's Sarah Rainsford reports from Tenerife where the MV Hondius has arrived, after a deadly hantavirus outbreak.
items.title_zh: 遭受病毒袭击的游轮抵达特内里费岛，医护人员正在等待乘客
items.summary_zh: BBC 的莎拉·雷恩斯福德 (Sarah Rainsford) 从特内里费岛报道，在致命的汉坦病毒爆发后，MV Hondius 号已抵达那里。

items.title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
items.summary: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.
items.title_zh: 普京表示他认为乌克兰冲突“即将结束”
items.summary_zh: 这位俄罗斯领导人看到了乌克兰谈判的潜力，但谴责西方对泽连斯基总统的支持。

items.title: Australia's right-wing One Nation party scores historic parliamentary win
items.summary: One Nation gains its first seat in the lower house, in a by-election seen as a key test for the populist party.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚右翼一国党取得历史性议会胜利
items.summary_zh: 一国党在补选中赢得了众议院的第一个席位，这被视为对民粹主义政党的关键考验。

items.title: Buddhist monk arrested over alleged rape of teen in Sri Lanka
items.summary: The Venerable Pallegama Hemarathana Thero holds one of the most revered positions in the Buddhist world.
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡一名佛教僧侣因涉嫌强奸青少年而被捕
items.summary_zh: 帕勒伽玛·赫马拉提罗 (Pallegama Hemarathana Thero) 尊者是佛教界最受尊敬的职位之一。

items.title: Suspected boat explosion injures 11 in Miami
items.summary: Officials are investigating what caused the explosion at a popular marina in southern Florida.
items.title_zh: 迈阿密疑似船只爆炸造成11人受伤
items.summary_zh: 官员们正在调查佛罗里达州南部一个热门码头发生爆炸的原因。

items.title: I will serve - not rule over Hungary, says new PM
items.summary: Nearly a month ago Péter Magyar steered his Tisza party to a landslide victory, sweeping away 16 years of rule by Viktor Orbán.
items.title_zh: 新总理表示，我将服务——而不是统治匈牙利
items.summary_zh: 大约一个月前，彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 带领蒂萨党取得压倒性胜利，推翻了欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的统治。

items.title: Greece conducts controlled blast of mystery naval drone explosives
items.summary: The unmanned vessel, suspected to be of Ukrainian origin, was found by fishermen in a cave on Thursday.
items.title_zh: 希腊对神秘海军无人机炸药进行受控爆炸
items.summary_zh: 周四，渔民在一个洞穴中发现了这艘疑似来自乌克兰的无人船。

items.title: The Man Who Cuts the Perfect Slice of Ham
items.summary: Spaniards line up at weddings, tennis tournaments and galas to eat ham prepared by Ernesto Soriano, one of the world’s best slicers of jamón ibérico.
items.title_zh: 切出完美火腿片的人
items.summary_zh: 西班牙人在婚礼、网球比赛和庆典上排队享用埃内斯托·索里亚诺（Ernesto Soriano）制作的火腿，他是世界上最好的伊比利亚火腿切片师之一。

items.title: How China’s Leader Lost Faith in His Generals
items.summary: Xi Jinping spent 13 years building a military to rival that of the United States. But the stronger the Chinese forces grew, the less he trusted the generals he had handpicked to run them.
items.title_zh: 中国领导人如何对他的将军失去信心
items.summary_zh: 习近平花了13年时间打造一支与美国相抗衡的军队。但中国军队越强大，他就越不信任他精心挑选的将军。

items.title: Punch, the Lonely Monkey Who Drew Crowds to a Small Japan Zoo, Is Growing Up. He’s Still a Star.
items.summary: The macaque, now 9 months old, has been attracting tens of thousands of visitors to a small Japanese zoo. He ignores the attention.
items.title_zh: 一只吸引人群来到日本小型动物园的孤独猴子“潘趣”正在长大。他仍然是明星。
items.summary_zh: 这只猕猴现在已经九个月大了，已经吸引了数万名游客来到日本的一个小型动物园。他无视人们的关注。

items.title: Rhun ap Iorwerth Breaks Labour’s Dominance in Wales
items.summary: Rhun ap Iorwerth, a former journalist, led his party to the most seats in the Welsh Parliament, ousting the Labour Party, which had long held sway, and beating Reform U.K.
items.title_zh: Rhun ap Iorwerth 打破了工党在威尔士的统治地位
items.summary_zh: 前记者鲁恩·阿普·约沃斯 (Rhun ap Iorwerth) 带领他的政党在威尔士议会中获得最多席位，驱逐了长期占据统治地位的工党，并击败了英国改革党。

items.title: One Nation Wins Australia Special Election, Claiming Seat in Lower House
items.summary: One Nation, an anti-immigration party with Trumpian policies that has risen in popularity, won a seat in Parliament’s lower house for the first time.
items.title_zh: 一国党赢得澳大利亚特别选举，获得下议院席位
items.summary_zh: 推行特朗普政策的反移民政党“一国党”越来越受欢迎，首次赢得议会下议院席位。

items.summary: There has been 34 verified incidents globally, a 41% increase from the same period in 2025, CertiK said in a report published Friday.
